ddls:
CREATE TABLE "molecules" (
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecule record */,
  "chembl_id" TEXT /* ChEMBL ID for the molecule */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the molecule's structure */,
  "pchembl_value" REAL /* pChEMBL value indicating the potency of the compound */,
  "target_id" TEXT /* ChEMBL ID for the target associated with the molecule */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target protein */,
  "cell_id" TEXT /* ChEMBL ID for the cell line associated with the molecule */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the compound */,
  "inchi" TEXT /* InChI representation of the molecule's structure */,
  "inchi_key" TEXT /* InChIKey representation of the molecule's structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecules_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecules_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target protein */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., protein, enzyme) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target's function or role */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol associated with the target */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* UniProt ID for the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cells" (
  "cell_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "cell_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the cell line (e.g., tissue type) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell line characteristics */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell (e.g., epithelial, mesenchymal) */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Tissue type from which the cell line was derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assays" (
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assay */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the assay (e.g., MTS, proliferation) */,
  "target_id" TEXT /* ChEMBL ID for the target associated with the assay */,
  "assay_type" TEXT /* Type of assay (e.g., biochemical, cell-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assays_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assay used */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the molecule tested */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the experiment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator who performed the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the researcher belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher involved */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration (null if ongoing) */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead author */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was released */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the molecule being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the molecule being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the molecule data */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the collection */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_collection_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the molecule */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who added the molecule to the collection */,
  "addition_date" TEXT /* Date when the molecule was added to the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_collection_entries_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_collection_entries_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES compound_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity score */,
  "molecule_id1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first molecule */,
  "molecule_id2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second molecule */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two molecules */,
  "similarity_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the similarity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_similarity_molecule_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id1") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_similarity_molecule_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id2") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)
